problem id: 70f08eac
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11111111 -> 11000000
  10110110 -> 01000110
  01011011 -> 10100011
  01100100 -> 01011111
  00110010 -> 00101111
  11011001 -> 10101011
  00100100 -> 01001011
  00000100 -> 01000001
  11101011 -> 10000100

query: 11010110
predicted answer: 01011000
